category_sources: source_facts.description says it monitors file system directory events; official GNU Direvent page calls it a directory event monitoring daemon.
display_name_sources: Official project page title is GNU Direvent; source_facts.name is direvent.
docs_sources: Official GNU Direvent page links to Documentation; official manual URL is published under the same project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; FSF Free Software Directory lists the Savannah VCS Repository Webview for GNU Direvent.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official GNU page describes daemon behavior and filesystem event monitoring.
